---
title: "explore the results"
output: html_document
---

```{r}
source('functions.R')
```

# Read in Results
```{r}
# logistic regression 
pred_sc1_p1  <- readRDS("sim_results/predictions/sc1_p1_1_2000.rds")
pred_sc1_p7  <- readRDS("sim_results/predictions/sc1_p7_1_2000.rds")
pred_sc1_p13 <- readRDS("sim_results/predictions/sc1_p13_1_2000.rds")

pred_sc3_p1  <- readRDS("sim_results/predictions/sc3_p1_1_2000.rds")
pred_sc3_p7  <- readRDS("sim_results/predictions/sc3_p7_1_2000.rds")
pred_sc3_p13 <- readRDS("sim_results/predictions/sc3_p13_1_2000.rds")
```


------ exploratory plots ------------------------------------------------------- 

```{r, fig.height = 8}
n <- sample(2000, 10)

pred_sc1_p13 %>% 
  mutate(iter = as.factor(iter)) %>% 
  filter(iter %in% n) %>% 
  ggplot(aes(x = pred, y = iter)) + 
  geom_density_ridges(fill = "aliceblue", scale = 0.5)+
  theme_minimal()
```


```{r}
# What other checks are helpful. 
```
